header_subtitle: Mechanical Design Engineer, passionate about ecological transition, responsible design and new mobility.
about_paragraph1: I am a young engineer passionate about mechanical design, driven by a conviction: engineering can — and must — actively contribute to ecological transition. My journey has led me to explore both industrialization, responsible design, and digital tools.
about_paragraph2: I am as comfortable on Catia as I am on a workbench, and I enjoy navigating between modeling, prototyping, and coding. My goal: to design products that make sense. This portfolio reflects this vision.
project_winddatas_desc: Python project developed as part of my final year internship at Ciel & Terre. It allows collecting, processing and comparing wind data from various sources (NOAA, Meteostat, OpenMeteo).
project_robotarm_desc: Mechatronics project carried out at Polytech Nice. Design and 3D printing of an articulated arm controlled by Arduino.
project_cabletransport_desc: Design of a cable load transport system. Teamwork, CAD modeling, water jet cutting, machining, mechanical assembly and functional testing.
project_velomobile_desc: Mechanical design project with a low-tech approach. Realization of a recumbent tandem tricycle modeled in Catia.
project_lowtech_workshops_desc: Co-facilitation of introductory workshops on low-tech approaches for a broad audience.
edu_cielterre_desc: Study of sizing floating solar plants. Development of internal tools.
edu_getec_desc: Welding, painting and fine sheet metalwork in the railway industry. Industrialization and quality.
edu_thales_desc: 3D printing for wiring support on underwater drone. Creo modeling.
edu_uvigo_desc: Industrial design, Finite Element Method, Thermal engines, Laser technologies.
edu_polytech_desc: Design, CAD/CAM, Structural simulation, Heat transfers, Eco-design.
